inputs.label: Formation Enthalpy (ΔH_f)
inputs.businessContext: Standard enthalpy of formation of the ionic compound from its elements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard enthalpy of formation of the ionic compound from its elements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İyonik bileşiğin elementlerinden standart oluşum entalpisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Bildungsenthalpie der Ionenverbindung aus ihren Elementen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Enthalpie standard de formation du composé ionique à partir de ses éléments.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entalpía estándar de formación del compuesto iónico a partir de sus elementos.

inputs.label: Sublimation Energy (S)
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to vaporize one mole of the metal (cation precursor).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required to vaporize one mole of the metal (cation precursor).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir mol metalin (katyon öncüsü) buharlaştırılması için gereken enerji.
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie, die benötigt wird, um ein Mol des Metalls (Kationenvorstufe) zu verdampfen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie nécessaire pour vaporiser une mole du métal (précurseur cationique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía requerida para vaporizar un mol del metal (precursor catiónico).

inputs.label: Atomization Enthalpy per X atom
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to form one mole of isolated gaseous X atoms from the standard state of element X (e.g., ½ bond dissociation energy for diatomic X₂).

label_i18n.es: Entalpía de atomización por átomo X

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required to form one mole of isolated gaseous X atoms from the standard state of element X (e.g., ½ bond dissociation energy for diatomic X₂).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Element X'in standart halinden bir mol izole gaz halindeki X atomu oluşturmak için gereken enerji (ör. diatomik X₂ için bağ ayrışma enerjisinin yarısı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie, die benötigt wird, um ein Mol isolierte gasförmige X-Atome aus dem Standardzustand des Elements X zu bilden (z.B. ½ Dissoziationsenergie für zweiatomiges X₂).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie nécessaire pour former une mole d'atomes X gazeux isolés à partir de l'état standard de l'élément X (ex. ½ énergie de dissociation pour X₂ diatomique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía requerida para formar un mol de átomos gaseosos aislados X a partir del estado estándar del elemento X (ej., ½ energía de disociación de enlace para X₂ diatómico).

inputs.label: Ionization Energy (IP)
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to remove the most loosely held electron from one mole of gaseous metal atoms to form cations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required to remove the most loosely held electron from one mole of gaseous metal atoms to form cations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir mol gaz halindeki metal atomundan en gevşek bağlı elektronu uzaklaştırmak için gereken enerji.
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie, die benötigt wird, um das am lockersten gebundene Elektron aus einem Mol gasförmiger Metallatome zu entfernen, um Kationen zu bilden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie nécessaire pour retirer l'électron le plus faiblement lié d'une mole d'atomes métalliques gazeux pour former des cations.
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía requerida para eliminar el electrón más débilmente unido de un mol de átomos metálicos gaseosos para formar cationes.

inputs.label: Lattice Energy (U)
inputs.businessContext: Energy released when gaseous ions combine to form one mole of the ionic solid (exothermic, input as positive magnitude).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy released when gaseous ions combine to form one mole of the ionic solid (exothermic, input as positive magnitude).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz halindeki iyonların bir mol iyonik katı oluşturmak üzere birleşmesiyle açığa çıkan enerji (ekzotermik, pozitif büyüklük olarak girin).
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie, die freigesetzt wird, wenn gasförmige Ionen zu einem Mol des ionischen Feststoffs kombinieren (exotherm, als positiver Betrag eingeben).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie libérée lorsque des ions gazeux se combinent pour former une mole de solide ionique (exothermique, saisir comme magnitude positive).
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía liberada cuando los iones gaseosos se combinan para formar un mol del sólido iónico (exotérmico, ingresar como magnitud positiva).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
